content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(6, 8, 2), (0, 5, 4), (1, 2, 6), (1, 9, 6), (6, 7, 8), (5, 6, 10), (3, 4, 16), (7, 9, 16), (2, 5, 17), (2, 7, 19), (2, 6, 20), (2, 9, 21), (2, 4, 22), (5, 7, 22), (1, 5, 23), (3, 8, 24), (5, 9, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 4.

After scanning each edge, we have the following information:

* Edge (0, 5, 4) has node 0 and time 4. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 2, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (6, 7, 8) has node 6 and time 8. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 6, 10) has node 5 and time 10. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 4, 16) has node 3 and time 16. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (7, 9, 16) has node 7 and time 16. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 5, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 7, 19) has node 2 and time 19. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 6, 20) has node 2 and time 20. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 9, 21) has node 2 and time 21. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 4, 22) has node 2 and time 22. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (5, 7, 22) has node 5 and time 22. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 5, 23) has node 1 and time 23. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 8, 24) has node 3 and time 24. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 9, 29) has node 5 and time 29. -> Add node 9.

The nodes matched are 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, and 23.

Answer: [5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 23]
